inputs.label: Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Frequency at which the transfer function magnitude is evaluated.

inputs.businessContext: Real part of the first pole location in the s-plane.

inputs.businessContext: Imaginary part of the first pole location in the s-plane.

inputs.label: Pole 2 - Real Part

inputs.businessContext: Imaginary part of the second pole location in the s-plane.

inputs.label: Zero 1 - Real Part
inputs.businessContext: Real part of the first zero location in the s-plane.

inputs.businessContext: Imaginary part of the first zero location in the s-plane.
